result.stderr:
VerBump 0.2.1
(C) 2021 Joost W. Morsink

  bump       Bumps all projects to next version, if they have changes compared
             to the base.

  info       Displays info about projects and whether there have been changes or
             bumps since the pinned base.

  init       Initializes the git repo for verbump.

  pin        Pins a new base.

  help       Display more information on a specific command.

  version    Display version information.
